Table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT2

Card of table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT2

Name

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT2

Code

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT2

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT2

---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENTS

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

 

WITH CleanedProductCatalog AS (

SELECT

MD5(

COALESCE(EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(TO_VARCHAR(__LOAD_TS), '-1')

) AS MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY,

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE

FROM (

SELECT

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE,

__LOAD_TS

ROW_NUMBER() OVER (

PARTITION BY

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE

ORDER BY __LOAD_TS DESC

) AS rn

FROM DB_CONS_STG_QAS.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG

)

WHERE rn = 1

),

 

RankedAvailability AS (

SELECT

MD5(

COALESCE(aa.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(aa.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(aa.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_GROUPID, '-1') ||

COALESCE(aa.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_PRODUCTVERSIONS_EAN, '-1') ||

COALESCE(aa.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_PRODUCTVERSIONS_PMIPRODUCTCODE, '-1')||

COALESCE(TO_VARCHAR(aa.__LOAD_TS), '-1')

) AS RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT_KEY,

pc.MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY,

aa.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE AS COUNTRY_CODE_BK,

aa.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE AS PRODUCT_CODE_BK,

aa.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_ARTICLEAPPROVEDSTATUSCODE AS ARTICLE_APPROVED_STATUS_CODE,

aa.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_EXTERNALBULLETS AS EXTERNAL_BULLET,

aa.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_EXTERNALKEYPRODUCTFEATURES AS EXTERNAL_KEY_PRODUCT_FEATURE,

aa.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_EXTERNALPRODUCTDESCRIPTION AS EXTERNAL_PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION,

aa.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_EXTERNALTITLE AS EXTERNAL_TITLE,

aa.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_GROUPID AS GROUP_CODE_BK,

aa.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_OFFLINEDATE AS OFFLINE_DATE,

aa.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_ONLINEDATE AS ONLINE_DATE,

aa.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_PREORDERDATEUNTIL AS PRE_ORDER_END_DATE,

aa.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_PRODUCTVERSIONS_ACTIVE AS PRODUCT_VERSION_ACTIVE_FLAG,

aa.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_PRODUCTVERSIONS_EAN AS PRODUCT_VERSION_EAN_BK,

aa.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_PRODUCTVERSIONS_PMIPRODUCTCODE AS PRODUCT_VERSION_PMI_PRODUCT_CODE_BK,

aa.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_PRODUCTVERSIONS_RANKING AS PRODUCT_VERSION_RANKING,

aa.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_PRODUCTVERSIONS_SPLITRATE AS PRODUCT_VERSION_SPLIT_RATE,

ROW_NUMBER() OVER (

PARTITION BY

aa.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

aa.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE,

aa.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_GROUPID,

aa.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_PRODUCTVERSIONS_EAN,

aa.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_PRODUCTVERSIONS_PMIPRODUCTCODE,

aa.__LOAD_TS

ORDER BY aa.__LOAD_TS DESC

) AS row_priority

FROM DB_CONS_STG_QAS.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENTS aa

LEFT JOIN CleanedProductCatalog pc

ON aa.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE = pc.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE

AND aa.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE = pc.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE

)

 

SELECT *

FROM RankedAvailability

WHERE row_priority = 1;

 

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_GROUPID,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_PRODUCTVERSIONS_EAN, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_AVAILABILITYASSIGNMENTS_PRODUCTVERSIONS_PMIPRODUCTCODE, __LOAD_TS

Primary key(s) Target: PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT_KEY

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- PII data - The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level. --

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2

 

----------

RLS

----------

based on COUNTRY_CODE_BK (events_country_code)

 

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

Target schema: PL_CONSUMERORDER


Check constraint name of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT2

CKT_RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILA


Server validation rule of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT2

%RULES%


Code preview of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT2

drop table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT2 cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT2
--==============================================================
create or replace table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT2 (

);

alter table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_AVAILABILITY_ASSIGNMENT2 set comment = 'Reference data entity capturing the assignment of a product''s market availability, including online/offline periods, approval status, external bulletins, rankings, and market-specific eligibility flags.';
